title: NA-ULIP
word_text:
ULIP Investment Tips You May Consider to Optimize Returns
Overview on ULIP
Unit-linked insurance plans, better known as ULIPs, are a type of life insurance product. However, unlike other life insurance plans, these plans come with an investment component which is market-linked. So, along with protection, ULIPs offer you the benefit of market-linked investment opportunities as well.
In ULIPs, the premium is invested in market-linked funds. As a policyholder, you have the freedom to choose between a diversified basket of funds, as per your risk appetite and financial requirements.
How to Choose a ULIP Plan for Your Investments?
Usually, the financial security of loved ones is one important life goal for every individual. While ULIPs are often a preferred option, choosing the right one can often pose some confusion. You may consider these ULIP investment tips to make a well-informed decision.
Chalk out your needs right from the beginning:Having clarity on your goals will give a clear direction to your investment. From planning a foreign holiday to building a corpus for your retirement, ULIPs may be ideal for such plans. As ULIPs are versatile, they may suit all age groups. They can be tailored to your needs and future goals.
Analyze your preferred ULIP⁴There are broadly 2 types of ULIPs: Type 1 and Type 2. Understand each to pick the right one:
Type 1 ULIPIn case of the death of the insured, whatever is higher, the sum assured or the fund value will be disbursed to the beneficiary.
Type 2 ULIPIn case of the death of the insured, the death benefit is the total of the sum assured and the fund value.
Make sure you know your risk appetite Understand how market fluctuations can affect your investment, and invest as per your risk-taking capacity.
Choose the right tenure Typically, ULIPs come with a 5-year lock-in. While it is allowed to withdraw money after this tenure, you may want to avoid doing so. A longer tenure may increase the return-generating potential of the policy, subject to market volatility.
How to Manage ULIP Funds?
Simply put, ULIPs are insurance plans that come with an investment component. Along with safeguarding your family’s future, you also get a chance to earn market-linked returns on the investment. However, you need to remember that with ULIPs, you invest your money in the capital market, which is attached to certain risks. While these funds are managed by professionals, there are a few things that you need to keep in mind in order to manage your ULIP funds.
Switching funds:Fund-switching is indeed a unique feature of ULIPs that makes it possible for you to protect your investment as well as get better returns. For example, a fund switch can be ideal when the market is expected to rise or fall. Some consider realigning funds as they advance in age. Hence switching the funds may work in your favour if you can monitor the markets.
Portfolio rebalancing:If you are not well-versed with the market volatility, automatic switching or portfolio rebalancing can be your saviour. There are some pre-defined rebalancing strategies offered by insurers which may be used to manage your portfolio to suit your needs so that your financial goals are not affected by the market volatility.
Use the top-up facility to enhance the policy benefits In case you have some surplus funds, you can make an additional investment. Top-ups help you enhance the coverage as well along with increasing the fund value.
Investment Tips on ULIP to Achieve Your Long-Term Life Goals:
ULIPs, because of the dual benefits that they offer, may be a sought-after choice for some. If you already have or are planning to invest in them, following a few ULIP investment tips may help you get better returns. Take a look:
Invest early By investing early in life, you add the advantage of time to your investments. Even with small amounts, you can build a sufficient corpus for varied financial goals.
Do not miss the premiumChoose the premium paying frequency as per your paying capacity. Missing a premium can affect the corpus you wish to gather.
Use the flexibility feature to your advantageULIPs are flexible and allow you to control your investment. Through fund switching and premium redirection, you can manage your investment per the changing market dynamics.
Keep an eye on the marketFluctuations in the market affect your investment. Make sure you keep a careful eye on the market. Switch funds if need be.
Read the offer document carefullyUnderstand the inclusions and exclusions of your plan. Also prefer plans that have a minimal charge structure.
Avoid early withdrawalsAs far as possible, abstain from making partial withdrawals, as it may negatively impact your corpus and the returns.
Understand tax-saving options1ULIPs can work as a great tax-saving instrument.
Premiums up to 10% of the sum assured, qualify for a deduction of up to Rs.1.5 lakhs under Section 80C under old tax regime
The death benefit is tax-free
ULIPs purchased before 1st February 20212:
The maturity benefit will be tax-free under Section 10(10D) if the premium is up to 10% of the sum assured
ULIPs purchased after 1st February 2021:
The maturity benefit is tax-free if the premium paid for all ULIPs is up to Rs.2.5 lakhs.
Maturity benefit will be taxable as Capital Gain, if premium paid exceeds Rs. 2.5 lakhs.
ULIP Buying Guide:
Once you make up your mind that you wish to invest in ULIPs, things can be very simple. Through our well-illustrated portal, you can invest in the policy of your choice, from the comfort of your home or workplace. Let's see how:
Go to the Bajaj Allianz Life Insurance home page or click here
Click on the ULIP section, which is under the ‘Plans’ drop-down option
Go through the various options. Analyze the plans as per your needs. When you decide on one, click on ‘Invest Now’
Fill in the required personal details, and thereafter, fill in the policy requirements. Take your time in choosing the policy term and the investment amount and deciding the investment strategy
Once you submit the policy details, you will be shown the premium. You will also be able to see the benefits in the form of an illustration. Fret not, you still have the option of modifying any policy details that you want
Once you are satisfied, you need to make the premium payment through any of the given payment modes available
Once the steps are completed, your ULIP will be issued.
In case you wish to purchase the policy offline, you can visit the nearest Bajaj Allianz Life Insurance company office. The company executives will help you choose and then buy the ULIP you want.
To find an office near you, click here.
Conclusion
Understanding your investment product can be helpful in expecting the right returns. The case is similar to ULIPs. Tracking the market and managing your portfolio accordingly can be helpful in getting the desired results. While market-savvy investors can manage their funds themselves, first-time/ new investors may choose to keep in mind the above-mentioned ULIP investment tips. If you are still not very confident or need some extra help, you can rely on a fund manager.
FAQs on ULIPs
Do ULIPs give good returns?When it comes to giving good returns, ULIPs do have the potential. However, as an investor in the market, you need to understand the associated risks and invest only as per your risk-taking capacity.
How do I determine my investment goals and risk tolerance for ULIPs?When choosing an investment product, you need to factor in a number of things. Your age, your familial responsibility, your income, your personality and your risk-taking capacity are a few of them. It is also essential to expect reasonable returns from your ULIPs.
What are the different investment fund options available in ULIPs?You can the following funds for investment:
Equity funds
Liquid funds
Debt funds
Balanced funds.
How can I diversify my ULIP investment portfolio?ULIPs allow you to manage your investments. Depending on your risk appetite, you can choose a type of fund or a combination of many. Diversification allows you to mitigate the risk in a systematic way.
